response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
total area = 20 × 15 = 300  
area for dining tables = 300 − πr²  
equation: 300 − πr² = 2πr²  
300 = 3πr²  
r² = 300 / (3π) = 100 / π  
r = √(100 / π) ≈ 5.64  

2. radius of fountain = r / 3 ≈ 1.88  
surface area = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.81  
cost = 17.81 × 50 = 890.5  

r  
890.5
